entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: Country in Africa where soil nutrient depletion is a major issue

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Continent where Ethiopia is located

entities.name: CENTRAL ETHIOPIA
entities.description: Region where soil nutrient balance assessments were conducted

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing soil nutrients to maximize yield and maintain health

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The continued capacity of soil to function as a vital living ecosystem

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The capacity of a soil to function within an ecosystem

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The ratio of agricultural outputs to inputs

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES
entities.description: Benefits provided by ecosystems to humans

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT MINING
entities.description: The removal of nutrients from the soil without adequate replenishment

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT DEPLETION
entities.description: The reduction in the amount of nutrients available in the soil

entities.name: TOPSOIL EROSION
entities.description: The wearing away of the top layer of soil

entities.name: STEEP SLOPE CULTIVATION
entities.description: Agricultural practice of farming on steep inclines

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient that is depleted in Ethiopian soils

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient that is depleted and fixed in Ethiopian soils

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient that is depleted in Ethiopian soils

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT BALANCE ASSESSMENTS
entities.description: The process of evaluating nutrient inputs and outputs in the soil

entities.name: ALUMINUM TOXICITY
entities.description: The toxic effect of aluminum on plants, common in acidic soils

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS FIXATION
entities.description: The process where phosphorus becomes unavailable to plants

entities.name: FERTILIZER APPLICATIONS
entities.description: The act of applying fertilizers to the soil to replenish nutrients
